_comment: Rotating pool for the dissent-based humanity check (R12, docs/01-functional-spec.md S4). kind=oath → pass by dissenting (refuse the sycophantic oath); kind=control → a sincere statement where pass = agree, so an 'always dissent' bot also fails. Option order is randomized server-side; the pass option is never sent to the client.
oaths: I fully trust that all world leaders serve humanity's interest before their own.
Every politician on this list deserves my unconditional loyalty.
I promise never to question the decisions of those in power.
The powerful always know better than ordinary citizens, and I defer to them.
I swear to support whichever leader ranks highest here, no matter what.
controls: Citizens are allowed to disagree with their leaders.
It is reasonable to change your mind when you learn new facts.
A fair comparison should judge each person on their own merits.
